Cosmetic Dentistry · Ahmedabad

Best Teeth Whitening in Ahmedabad (2026)

Every whitening option compared honestly — from home kits to professional laser whitening by Dr. Siddharth Mehta.

Dr. Siddharth Mehta
BDS MDS · Implant & Laser Dentist, Ahmedabad
📍 Shyamal Cross Road, Ahmedabad 🕐 5 min read 🦷 Expert Dental Article

Teeth Whitening Options in Ahmedabad — 2026 Guide

Professional dental care and teeth whitening — Ahmedabad

A bright white smile is one of the most requested treatments at our dental clinic in Ahmedabad. Here is an honest guide to every whitening option available.

Option 1: Professional Laser Whitening (Best Results)

⚡ Laser whitening at our Ahmedabad clinic: 4–8 shades lighter in a single 60–90 minute session. Immediate, dramatic results.
Cost: ₹8,000–₹15,000
Beautiful smile results — teeth whitening treatment in Ahmedabad

Option 2: Take-Home Whitening Trays

Custom-fitted trays with professional-strength gel. Results of 3–5 shades lighter over 1–2 weeks. Cost: ₹4,000–₹7,000

Option 3: Over-the-Counter Products

Available at Ahmedabad pharmacies. Low concentration (3–6%), lightens by only 1–2 shades over months with inconsistent results.

What causes staining?

  • Tea and coffee (very common in Ahmedabad!)
  • Tobacco and betel nut
  • Natural ageing
  • Certain medications
Healthy smile after professional whitening treatment

How long do results last?

Professional whitening lasts 1–2 years with proper care. Recommend a maintenance clean every 6 months.

Book Laser Whitening in Ahmedabad

Get 4–8 shades whiter in a single session at our Shyamal Cross Road clinic.
